statement: In every magma, Equation 1795 (`x = (y * z) * ((z * y) * z)`) implies Equation 4237 (`x * y = ((z * z) * w) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0293
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op (op z y) z))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op (op z z) w) x)
